item.title: Ukrainian bank workers released after detention in Hungary
item.description: Kyiv has reacted furiously after officials in Budapest accused staff transporting cash to Ukraine of money laundering.

item.title: Beirut evacuees 'sleeping in tents and cars'
item.description: Some residents in the Beirut suburb of Dahieh have left their homes amid ongoing air strikes by Israel.

item.title: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
item.description: Suspected Islamist militants reportedly seized control of a village for two days before being forced out by troops and air strikes.

item.title: US economy unexpectedly sheds 92,000 jobs in February
item.description: The contraction came as a surprise with payrolls down in nearly every sector.

item.title: Indonesia to ban social media and other online platforms for under 16s
item.description: It is the latest country to curb young people's access to digital spaces to try and protect them from abuse.
